sectors.news_driver: Axis Bank hikes stake in Axis Max Life Insurance to 19.9%

stocks.name: Axis Bank
stocks.reason: Axis Bank's increased stake in Axis Max Life Insurance -> expected increase in insurance revenue -> 5-7% increase in non-interest income

sectors.news_driver: Maruti, Tata lead PV industry to continue growth momentum in May 2026

stocks.name: Maruti Suzuki
stocks.reason: Maruti's continued growth momentum in PV sales -> increased market share -> 8-10% increase in Q2 revenue

stocks.name: Tata Motors
stocks.reason: Tata's growth momentum in PV sales -> improved profitability -> 100-150bps increase in margins

sectors.news_driver: Dept of Agriculture cuts back on urea, DAP requirements amid expectations of lower monsoon

stocks.name: UPL
stocks.reason: Lower urea and DAP requirements -> reduced demand for fertilizers -> 5-7% decrease in Q2 revenue

sectors.news_driver: Zee snags comprehensive FIFA broadcast, streaming rights just days before World Cup begins

stocks.name: Zee Entertainment
stocks.reason: Zee's acquisition of FIFA broadcast rights -> increased ad revenue -> 10-12% increase in Q2 revenue
